every.title: Cadence
every.description: Cadence unit for the scheduled job. For example, `every = "day"` would run the job once per day. Supported values are: `minute`, `hour`, `day`, `week`, and `month`.

entrypoint.title: Entrypoint
entrypoint.description:
Python callable to run, in the format:
```
importable.module:function
```

For example, for a scheduled job like:

```python
def run():
    ...
```

in a file at `jobs/cleanup.py`, the config could look like:

```toml
[tool.scheduled.cleanup]
every = "day"
entrypoint = "jobs.cleanup:run"
```
